zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Endersby於1589年9月25日出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾卡丁頓時，她的父親Thomas Kynaston or Knutson42歲，母親Margeriae37歲。她於1603年與Edward Humphrey Dimmock在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾平賀貝可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1604年8月9日在英國貝德福爾卡丁頓享年14歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Endersby于1589年9月25日出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾卡丁頓时，她的父亲Thomas Kynaston or Knutson42岁，母亲Margeriae37岁。她于1603年与Edward Humphrey Dimmock在英国英格兰林可爾史爾平賀貝可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1604年8月9日在英国貝德福爾卡丁頓享年14岁。

nameMeanings.name: Endersby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Enderby
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): habitational name from Enderby (Lincolnshire) or possibly from Enderby (Leicestershire), from the Old Norse personal name Eindrithi (of uncertain etymology) + Old Norse bý ‘farm, village’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Endersby was born on 25 September 1589, in Cardington, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Kynaston or Knutson, was 42 and her mother, Margeriae, was 37. She married Edward Humphrey Dimmock in 1603, in Pinchbeck, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 9 August 1604, in Cardington, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 14.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Endersby est née le 25 septembre 1589, à Cardington, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Kynaston or Knutson, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margeriae, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Humphrey Dimmock en 1603, à Pinchbeck, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 9 août 1604, à Cardington, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 14 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Endersby am 25. September 1589 in Cardington, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Kynaston or Knutson 42 und ihre Mutter Margeriae 37. Sie hat 1603 in Pinchbeck, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Edward Humphrey Dimmock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 9. August 1604 im Alter von 14 Jahren in Cardington, Bedfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Endersby è nata il il 25 settembre 1589 nel Cardington, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Kynaston or Knutson, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Margeriae, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Edward Humphrey Dimmock nel 1603, nel Pinchbeck, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 agosto 1604, nel Cardington, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 14 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Endersbyが1589年9月25日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアカーディントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Kynaston or Knutsonは42歳，母Margeriaeは37歳であった。1603年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアピンチベックでEdward Humphrey Dimmockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1604年8月9日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアカーディントンで14歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Endersby(이)가 1589년 9월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 카딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Kynaston or Knutson(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margeriae(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1603년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 핀ch벡에서 Edward Humphrey Dimmock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1604년 8월 9일 영국 베드퍼드실르 카딩턴에서 14세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.25 Sep 1589–9 Aug 1604: 25 de setembro de 1589–9 de agosto de 1604
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Endersby nasceu em 25 de setembro de 1589, em Cardington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Kynaston or Knutson, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margeriae, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Humphrey Dimmock em 1603, em Pinchbeck, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1604, em Cardington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 14 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Endersby родилась 25 сентября 1589 г. в местности кардингтон, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Kynaston or Knutson было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margeriae, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Humphrey Dimmock в 1603 г. в местности пинчбекк, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 9 августа 1604 г. в местности кардингтон, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 14 лет.

Se casó con Edward Humphrey Dimmock en 1603, en Pinchbeck, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de agosto de 1604, en Cardington, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 14 años.
